seoTitle: Lima vs Lima South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lima and Lima South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lima vs Lima South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lima and Lima South.
heading: Lima vs Lima South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lima, Victoria and Lima South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lima South has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Lima (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lima or Lima South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lima has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Lima South scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lima scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Lima South scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lima or Lima South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lima South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
